option.name: originalContent
option.value: [project] name = "optigestion" version = "0.1.0" description = "Add your description here" requires-python = ">=3.13" dependencies = [ "pandas>=3.0.0", "pyqt6>=6.10.2", "ruff>=0.15.1", ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: [project] name = "optigestion" version = "0.1.0" description = "Add your description here" requires-python = ">=3.13" dependencies = [ "pandas>=3.0.0", "pyqt6>=6.10.2", "minizinc>=0.12.0", "matplotlib>=3.10.1", ] dev-dependencies = [ "ruff==0.15.1", "pytest>=8.0.0", ]
